name: Point Merrow Pictures
description: Workspace registry for The Last Signal. One cast, many episodes: the characters below are the single source of identity for every .skel in this folder.

characters.name: Harlan Morse
characters.identity_lock: Weathered white man in his early sixties, heavy build, salt-and-pepper beard, deep-set gray eyes, wind-burned skin, navy wool keeper's coat over a cable-knit sweater, brass pocket watch on a chain.
distinguishing_marks: missing tip of right ring finger
characters.default_wardrobe: Navy wool keeper's coat over cable-knit sweater
characters.want: To keep the light running and be left alone.
characters.need: To admit the signal is his own guilt, encoded.

characters.name: Eli Morse
characters.identity_lock: Lean white man in his mid-thirties, storm-gray parka over a fisherman's sweater, short dark beard, his father's gray eyes, a radio operator's headset worn around the neck.

relationships.description: Came back with proof, not forgiveness.

environments.name: Lighthouse Interior — Storm Night
environments.style_lock: Cramped octagonal lamp room, brass and salt-pitted iron, rain hammering black windows, single practical desk lamp and the rotating beam bleeding through the floor hatch, teal-orange storm grade, 35mm grain.
environments.geography: Radio bench against the north window; stair hatch center floor; the beam sweeps clockwise, crossing the bench every eight seconds; door to the gallery on the seaward east side.

locations.name: Point Merrow Lighthouse
locations.description: A 19th-century cast-iron lighthouse on a cliff above Wreck Beach, Maine coast.

props.name: Brass pocket watch
props.description: Tarnished brass pocket watch, cracked crystal, engraved "E.M."

skins.label: Signal Noir
skins.style_text: Teal-orange storm grade over hard noir contrast, 35mm grain, practical-source lighting, black rain-streaked windows.

series.title: The Last Signal
series.logline: A lighthouse keeper discovers the signal he has been logging for thirty years is his own confession, encoded.

episodes.title: Landfall
episodes.logline: Eli comes home with a tape that should not exist.

episodes.title: The Pattern
episodes.logline: Harlan maps the signal against thirty years of logbooks.

arcs.title: Where the signal comes from
arcs.description: The season spine: the signal is Harlan's own keyed confession.
